nasb.text: Leave the cities and dwell among the crags, O inhabitants of Moab, And be like a dove that nests Beyond the mouth of the chasm.

esv.text: “Leave the cities, and dwell in the rock, O inhabitants of Moab! Be like the dove that nests in the sides of the mouth of a gorge.

cnv.text: 摩押的居民哪！ 你們要離棄城鎮，住在山巖裡， 像鴿子在峽谷的邊上築巢。

ccb.text: “摩押人啊， 你们要离开城邑，住到岩洞里， 像鸽子在岩缝里筑巢一样。
